We provide 3 cabal [external commands][external-commands] that operate
on any matching file input file in the source tree:

[external-commands]: https://cabal.readthedocs.io/en/latest/external-commands.html

- `dpack` matches on any `package.dhall` writing `<package-name>.cabal`.
- `ypack` matches on any `package.yaml` writing `<package-name>.cabal`.
- `diy-pack` matches on any `package.dhall` writing `package.yaml`.

These commands all have similar options:

### Options

- `--package-dhall GLOB` is a glob pattern to include when searching for files.
- `--ignore-glob GLOB` is a glob pattern to ignore when searching for files.

These can each be supplied multiple times. If `--package-dhall` is not supplied
it defaults to `**/package.dhall`.

## `dpack`

This "d" in this `dpack` command is so named for the "d" of the `.dhall`
extension.

## `ypack`

This "y" in this `ypack` command is so named for the "y" of the `.yaml`
extension.

## `diy-pack`

This "diy" of this command is short for "d-i-y", for `.dhall` into `.yaml`.
